findings.message: No build/run command documented (-10); no test command documented, only aspirational 'pass all tests' language (-10); no architecture overview of the actual repo, content is generic full-stack boilerplate (-10)
README's headline agent count (33) is stale against the actual 37 agent definition files in the repo
